message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

actor "sdx_downstream" as sdxDownstream #09C4F2
participant downstream_quarantine #09C4F2
box "" DownStreamParticipant #D6DBDF ##Black 
    participant Downstream
end box
database Postgres #318CE7
package FTP #5FB403 { }


== Consume tx_id ==
activate sdxDownstream
downstream_quarantine ->> Downstream : GET /responses/{tx_id}
deactivate sdxDownstream
return response json 

break [error]
  return error message to quarantine queue  
else
  
   activate SequenceService
     downsteam->>+Sequence:GET/sequence\n[query params]\n{page_size=xxx}\n{order_by="asc"}\n...etc..
      deactivate SequenceService
      
       alt common-software
        
        POST/common_software/{seq_no}/images?image_ids=[id,id,...]&zip=true&include_meta=false
    
         else cora 
        
          post/cora/{seq_no}?ids=id&id....&&zip=True
     
           else cord
            
            post/cord/{seq_no}&ids=&zip=Ture
   
   
       
      
    
     
    

@enduml
